req.title: Create medication request
req.statement: A prescribing clinician shall issue a MedicationRequest; requests for controlled substances shall require schedule verification.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-008 requires that prescribers issue MedicationRequests with mandatory schedule verification for controlled substances (CII). The test suite uses Equivalence Partitioning to partition requests into non-controlled vs. controlled classes; Boundary Value Analysis to test schedule verification thresholds; Decision Table to verify the auth-schedule matrix; and Negative Path testing to confirm 403 rejection when schedule verification is absent. All tests are idempotent, self-contained, and deterministic.

tests.name: test_medication_request_non_controlled_success
preconditions: medication is non-controlled (Schedule IV or unscheduled)
actions: include patient reference, prescriber ID, dosage, frequency
expected: response body contains id and status=active
tests.executable:
import requests
import json
from datetime import datetime

def test_medication_request_non_controlled_success():
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <valid_prescriber_token>'}
    payload = {
        'resourceType': 'MedicationRequest',
        'status': 'active',
        'intent': 'order',
        'medicationCodeableConcept': {'coding': [{'code': '243516', 'system': 'http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm'}]},
        'subject': {'reference': 'Patient/12345'},
        'authoredOn': datetime.now().isoformat(),
        'requester': {'reference': 'Practitioner/67890'}
    }
    resp = requests.post('http://localhost:8080/MedicationRequest', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 201, f'Expected 201, got {resp.status_code}'
    body = resp.json()
    assert 'id' in body and body.get('status') == 'active'
    assert <notification_service_received_event>(body['id'])

tests.name: test_medication_request_controlled_cii_without_schedule_verification_403
actions: POST /MedicationRequest with CII medication (morphine, schedule code=II)
include patient reference, prescriber ID, dosage
trace: R-HLT-008: requests for controlled substances shall require schedule verification
R-HLT-008 error pathway: 403 without schedule verification for CII
decision: medication is CII AND scheduleVerification absent → reject
tests.executable:
import requests
import json
from datetime import datetime

def test_medication_request_controlled_cii_without_schedule_verification_403():
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <valid_prescriber_token>'}
    payload = {
        'resourceType': 'MedicationRequest',
        'status': 'active',
        'intent': 'order',
        'medicationCodeableConcept': {'coding': [{'code': '10437', 'system': 'http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm', 'display': 'morphine'}]},
        'subject': {'reference': 'Patient/12345'},
        'authoredOn': datetime.now().isoformat(),
        'requester': {'reference': 'Practitioner/67890'},
        'dosageInstruction': [{'doseAndRate': {'doseQuantity': {'value': 10, 'unit': 'mg'}}}]
    }
    resp = requests.post('http://localhost:8080/MedicationRequest', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 403, f'Expected 403, got {resp.status_code}'
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get('issue', [{}])[0].get('code') == 'SCHEDULE_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED'
    assert not <request_persisted_in_db>()
    assert not <pharmacy_notification_sent>()

tests.name: test_medication_request_controlled_cii_with_valid_schedule_verification_201
preconditions: prescriber has valid DEA schedule verification credential
actions: include valid scheduleVerification object with dea_credential_id and verification_timestamp
include patient reference, prescriber ID, dosage
expected: response body contains id and status=active
audit log records verification credential used
trace: R-HLT-008: requests for controlled substances shall require schedule verification
decision table: CII + valid scheduleVerification → allow
tests.executable:
import requests
import json
from datetime import datetime

def test_medication_request_controlled_cii_with_valid_schedule_verification_201():
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <valid_prescriber_token>'}
    payload = {
        'resourceType': 'MedicationRequest',
        'status': 'active',
        'intent': 'order',
        'medicationCodeableConcept': {'coding': [{'code': '5489', 'system': 'http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm', 'display': 'hydrocodone'}]},
        'subject': {'reference': 'Patient/12345'},
        'authoredOn': datetime.now().isoformat(),
        'requester': {'reference': 'Practitioner/67890'},
        'extension': [{'url': 'http://fhir-lite.local/scheduleVerification', 'valueString': 'DEA-12345:CII:2025-01-15T12:00:00Z'}]
    }
    resp = requests.post('http://localhost:8080/MedicationRequest', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 201, f'Expected 201, got {resp.status_code}'
    body = resp.json()
    assert 'id' in body and body.get('status') == 'active'
    assert any(ext.get('url') == 'http://fhir-lite.local/scheduleVerification' for ext in body.get('extension', []))
    assert <pharmacy_notification_includes_schedule_metadata>(body['id'])

tests.name: test_medication_request_controlled_ciii_boundary_missing_verification
preconditions: medication is CIII (boundary: lowest controlled schedule)
expected: HTTP 403 Forbidden (same boundary rule as CII)
trace: R-HLT-008: boundary test—CIII is lowest controlled schedule requiring verification
R-HLT-008 error pathway: 403 without schedule verification for CII (and CIII implies same rule)
BVA: test boundary between unscheduled (no verification) and CIII (verification required)
tests.executable:
import requests
import json
from datetime import datetime

def test_medication_request_controlled_ciii_boundary_missing_verification():
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <valid_prescriber_token>'}
    payload = {
        'resourceType': 'MedicationRequest',
        'status': 'active',
        'intent': 'order',
        'medicationCodeableConcept': {'coding': [{'code': '2670', 'system': 'http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm', 'display': 'codeine'}]},
        'subject': {'reference': 'Patient/12345'},
        'authoredOn': datetime.now().isoformat(),
        'requester': {'reference': 'Practitioner/67890'}
    }
    resp = requests.post('http://localhost:8080/MedicationRequest', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 403, f'Expected 403 at CIII boundary, got {resp.status_code}'
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get('issue', [{}])[0].get('code') == 'SCHEDULE_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED'

tests.name: test_medication_request_non_prescriber_role_403
preconditions: authorization token valid for nurse role
trace: actor: prescriber only—nurse cannot create MedicationRequest
tests.executable:
import requests
import json
from datetime import datetime

def test_medication_request_non_prescriber_role_403():
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <valid_nurse_token>'}
    payload = {
        'resourceType': 'MedicationRequest',
        'status': 'active',
        'intent': 'order',
        'medicationCodeableConcept': {'coding': [{'code': '243516', 'system': 'http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm'}]},
        'subject': {'reference': 'Patient/12345'},
        'authoredOn': datetime.now().isoformat(),
        'requester': {'reference': 'Practitioner/67890'}
    }
    resp = requests.post('http://localhost:8080/MedicationRequest', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 403, f'Expected 403, got {resp.status_code}'
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get('issue', [{}])[0].get('code') in ['INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSION', 'INVALID_ROLE']
